response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with deep experience in developer tooling, test automation, and CI/CD infrastructure, plus relevant mobile-platform exposure. However, this is a people-management role requiring at least 2 years of formal people management and 3 years of technical leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of managing engineers, running one-on-ones, or owning team roadmaps. The gap on the core requirement of the role outweighs the technical fit.
strengths: Extensive developer-tools background: test runners (Trial), assertion libraries, Selenium training, CI/CD and dev-ops setup
18+ years of software development across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, well above the 8-year minimum
Hands-on mobile experience (iOS and Apple TV apps) plus teaching/workshop experience showing communication skills
concerns: No formal people-management experience; entire career trajectory is individual-contributor roles
No demonstrated experience setting team priorities, conducting performance reviews, or leading organizational change
No evidence of strategic roadmap ownership or managing at the scale of a large platform ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and test infrastructure expertise
